top_signals.title: US Stocks End Week Lower on Fears of Another ‘DeepSeek Moment’
top_signals.summary: US stocks finished the week lower as semiconductor names dipped following the reveal of an artificial-intelligence model from a Chinese startup.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sweetgreen Pares Drop as Parasite Tied to Taco Bell Lettuce
top_signals.summary: Sweetgreen Inc. shares surged on Friday, halting a four-day skid, after US regulators said a parasite outbreak that’s sickened thousands across several states was traced to shredded iceberg lettuce served at Taco Bell restaurants.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
